𝗠𝗘𝗥𝗖𝗨𝗥 | Building and managing custom multi-vendor e-commerce marketplaces.  ✨ Notable!

•••••••••••••••••••••••

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 📘 TypeScript 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Building and managing custom multi-vendor e-commerce marketplaces.
📅 Created: Apr 2024 • Updated: Apr 2026

•••••••••••••••••••••••

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Block-based architecture for reusable modules and extensions
✅ Standalone React-based vendor portal
✅ Dashboard SDK with Vite plugin and file-based routing
✅ CLI for project scaffolding and management
✅ Full code ownership without black-box dependencies
✅ Built on MedusaJS for a modern e-commerce foundation
✅ Customizable storefronts for B2B and B2C
✅ AI-agent friendly design with specific resources


•••••••••••••••••••••••

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐⭐ 1.5K 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 343 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 23 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

•••••••••••••••••••••••

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

Mercur is an open-source, block-based marketplace platform built on MedusaJS, designed for creating custom B2B and B2C marketplaces. It offers full code ownership, a modern tech stack, and a vendor portal, empowering businesses with flexibility and control.

•••••••••••••••••••••••

🔗 𝗟𝗜𝗡𝗞𝗦
• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/mercurjs/mercur

•••••••••••••••••••••••

Twake Drive is an open-source web application that functions as an alternative to Google Drive, providing robust file management capabilities. It allows users to organize, upload, share files and folders via URLs, and search their content, all within a user-friendly interface.

⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯

𝗣𝗔𝗣𝗘𝗥𝗕𝗔𝗡𝗔𝗡𝗔 | Automated generation of publication-quality academic diagrams, statistical plots, and research visuals from text descriptions.  📈 Growing!

❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🐍 Python 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Automated generation of publication-quality academic diagrams, statistical plots, and research visuals from text descriptions.
📅 Created: Feb 2026 • Updated: Apr 2026

❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Agentic framework for generating academic diagrams and plots
✅ Supports OpenAI, Azure OpenAI, and Google Gemini providers
✅ Two-phase multi-agent pipeline with iterative refinement
✅ Multiple VLM and image generation providers
✅ Input optimization layer
✅ Auto-refine mode and run continuation
✅ CLI, Python API, and MCP server integration
✅ Batch generation from manifest files (YAML/JSON)
✅ Batch plot generation from CSV/JSON
✅ PDF input support for methodology context
✅ PaperBanana Studio (Gradio web UI)
✅ Claude Code skills for code generation and evaluation


❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐⭐ 1.4K 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 210 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 15 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

PaperBanana is an open-source, community-driven implementation for automating the generation of academic illustrations, diagrams, and statistical plots from text descriptions. It extends the original PaperBanana concept with new domains like slide generation and offers a flexible, agentic framework supporting multiple LLM and VLM providers.

❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖

• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/llmsresearch/paperbanana

𝗧𝗜𝗡𝗬-𝗚𝗣𝗨 | Educational tool for learning GPU hardware architecture and parallel processing from the ground up.  🔥 Super Hot!

♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 📊 SystemVerilog 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Educational tool for learning GPU hardware architecture and parallel processing from the ground up.
📅 Created: Apr 2024 • Updated: Apr 2026

♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Minimal GPU design in Verilog
✅ Fully documented code (<15 files)
✅ Detailed documentation on architecture & ISA
✅ Working matrix addition/multiplication kernels
✅ Support for kernel simulation & execution traces
✅ Focus on GPGPU principles and parallelization


♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ 12.3K 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 1.2K 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 22 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

tiny-gpu is a minimal, documented Verilog implementation of a GPU designed to teach hardware-level GPU architecture and parallelization principles. It focuses on core GPGPU concepts rather than graphics-specific features, offering a simplified model for learning.

♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦

🔗 𝗟𝗜𝗡𝗞𝗦
• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/adam-maj/tiny-gpu

ChatDev 2.0 (DevAll) is a zero-code multi-agent platform for developing diverse applications by configuring agents and workflows. It evolved from ChatDev 1.0, a virtual software company automating the software development lifecycle through intelligent agent collaboration.
